ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the project is located */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency responsible for the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* A more descriptive name for the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., road, bridge, tunnel) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the project was initiated or updated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project is scheduled to start */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is scheduled to end */,
  "actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual date the project started */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual date the project ended */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the project */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total amount spent on the project so far */,
  "fed_funds" REAL /* Amount of federal funds allocated to the project */,
  "state_funds" REAL /* Amount of state funds allocated to the project */,
  "local_funds" REAL /* Amount of local funds allocated to the project */,
  "private_funds" REAL /* Amount of private funds allocated to the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the project record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES project_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_agency_name FOREIGN KEY ("agency_name") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the agency */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the agency */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the agency */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the agency's website */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* Email of the primary contact person */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency (e.g., county, city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project being tracked */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., 'in progress', 'completed', 'delayed') */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager who provided the status update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status */,
  "percentage_complete" REAL /* Percentage of the project that is complete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_status_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'project manager', 'agency admin', 'DOT official') */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agency the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., 'plan', 'report', 'update') */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
